title: Quality Cars by Jim Siegel: Tacoma and Nissan Maxima
html:
Title-only Apple Note from late 2019 — a 16-year-old Yahir tracking a local used-car shop's inventory (Tacoma, Nissan Maxima) at Corvallis-area dealer Quality Cars by Jim Siegel. Fits the same parallel-tracking pattern as later 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist.

yahir gonzalez · corvallis or · 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist

related.label: Facebook (note title) — pandemic-era watchlist, futures, and life admin
